name: koinos-one
description: Koinos One desktop app powered by the native monolithic Koinos node (Electron + React + TypeScript)
author: pgarciagon

scripts.build: npm run docs:build && npm run generate:build-info && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.package:mac: npm run notarize:preflight && npm run build:icon:mac && npm run build && npm run stage && npm run test:package-staging && electron-builder --mac dmg && npm run test:packaged
scripts.package:mac:signed: npm run build:icon:mac && npm run build && npm run stage && npm run test:package-staging && electron-builder --mac dmg && npm run test:packaged
scripts.package:mac:dir: npm run build:icon:mac && npm run build && npm run stage && npm run test:package-staging && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dir && npm run test:packaged
scripts.package:mac:unsigned: npm run build:icon:mac && npm run build && npm run stage && npm run test:package-staging && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dmg && npm run test:packaged
scripts.package:win: npm run build && npm run stage && npm run test:package-staging && electron-builder --win nsis && npm run test:packaged
scripts.package:mac:native: npm run build:icon:mac && npm run build && npm run stage && npm run test:package-staging && electron-builder --mac dmg && npm run test:packaged
scripts.test:ui:electron: npm run build && cross-env TELENO_PLAYWRIGHT_ELECTRON=1 playwright test --config=playwright.electron.config.ts tests/ui/electron-smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:ui:electron:remote: npm run build && cross-env TELENO_PLAYWRIGHT_ELECTRON=1 playwright test --config=playwright.electron.config.ts tests/ui/electron-remote-nodes.spec.ts
